criteria.given: hooks/lib/allowlist.py::match_sentinel_grant_for_write is called with a valid unexpired sentinel having allowed_operations=[{op:'Write'}] (no 'target' field) and correct session_id
criteria.then: The function returns the entry dict (not None); entry.get('op') == 'Write'

criteria.given: CLAUDE_TASK_ID is unset; a valid sentinel exists keyed by session_id with allowed_operations=[{op:'Write'}]; pretool-write-guard.sh candidate-list tries [session_id, data_task_id] (writer_key = session_id when CLAUDE_TASK_ID unset)
criteria.when: write-guard.sh is invoked (or candidate-list logic is exercised via unit/subprocess test)
criteria.then: The sentinel is found via session_id candidate; _WG_SENTINEL_RESULT = 'match'; hook exits 0

criteria.given: hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py with all pre-existing tests and the new targetless wildcard test
criteria.then: At minimum 41 tests pass (40 pre-existing + 1 new wildcard); 0 failures

criteria.given: The four modified files: hooks/lib/allowlist.py, hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh, hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py, hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py
criteria.when: bash -n hooks/pretool-write-guard.sh && python3 -m py_compile hooks/lib/allowlist.py hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py is run
